revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24755395338|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Ikuta Shrine (Q135187152)
| native_name = 生田神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Ikuta Shrine (Q135187152)
| coordinates = {{coord|35.258035|136.870529}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Ikuta Shrine'''|生田神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Owari Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province|ja|尾張国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11465292|1=List of Shikinaisha in Owari Province}}
** Series ordinal: 60
** P155: {{ill|Q11648178|ltq=Q11648178|qid=Q11648178|1=Haritsuna Shrine}}
** P156: {{ill|Q135039505|ltq=Q135039505|qid=Q135039505|1=Takumino Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Owari Province|lt=Owari Province|ar|أواري|ca|Província d'Owari|ckb|پارێزگای ئۆوواری|cs|Provincie Owari|de|Provinz Owari|en|Owari Province|es|Provincia de Owari|eu|Owari probintzia|fa|ولایت اوواری|fi|Owarin provinssi|fr|Province d'Owari|gl|Provincia de Owari|hak|Owari-koet|id|Provinsi Owari|it|Owari (provincia)|ja|尾張国|ko|오와리국|lt|Ovario žemė|nl|Owari (provincie)|pl|Prowincja Owari|pt|Província de Owari|ru|Овари (провинция)|simple|Owari Province|sk|Owari (provincia)|sr|Провинција Овари|tr|Owari (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Оварі|vi|Tỉnh Owari|wuu|尾张国|zh_min_nan|Owari-kok|zh_yue|尾張國|zh|尾張國|qid=Q514506|1=Owari Province}}
* {{ill|Q1347719|ltq=Q1347719|qid=Q1347719|1=Niwa District}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|35.258035|136.870529}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181400
** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Ikutano Shrine|lt=Ikutano Shrine|qid=Q135039503|1=Ikutano Shrine}}
** P2868: {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
